  S5 --click(Sound & vibration)--> S34
  S34 --click(Do Not Disturb)--> S35
  S35 --click(People)--> S36
  S36 --click(Calls)--> S37
  S36 --click(Messages)--> S38
  S35 --click(Alarms & other interruptions)--> S39
  S35 --click(Schedules)--> S40
  S5 --click(Digital Wellbeing & parental controls)--> S41  [pre: scrolled down]
  S41 --click(Dashboard)--> S42
  S42 --click(hourglass icon next to app)--> S43
  S5 --click(Privacy)--> S44  [pre: scrolled down]
  S44 --click(Notifications on lock screen)--> S45
STRATEGIES:
  OPEN_SETTINGS_FROM_HOME:
    preconditions: home_screen
    steps:
      1. swipe up to open app drawer
      2. if Settings not visible, swipe up to scroll alphabetically
      3. tap Settings icon
      4. alternative: swipe down from top twice to fully expand Quick Settings then tap gear icon
    success_signal: Settings main menu is displayed
    fallback: If wrong app launched, press Home and retry
  TOGGLE_BATTERY_PERCENTAGE:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. click(Battery)
      2. find Battery percentage row
      3. tap toggle to enable
    success_signal: Battery percentage visible in status bar
  ENABLE_BATTERY_SAVER:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. click(Battery)
      2. click(Battery Saver)
      3. tap Use Battery Saver toggle
      4. confirm Turn on if prompted
      5. optionally disable 'Turn off when charged' if device charging
    success_signal: Toggle in ON state and system UI changes (dark theme/red battery icon)
  CONFIGURE_BATTERY_SAVER_SCHEDULE:
    preconditions: battery_saver
    steps:
      1. click(Set a schedule)
      2. select 'Based on your routine' or other option
      3. click OK on info dialog if shown
    success_signal: Selected schedule radio shows as active
  ADD_VPN_PROFILE:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. click(Network & internet) -> click(VPN)
      2. click(+) to open Edit VPN profile
      3. tap Name, type name
      4. tap Server address, type address
      5. scroll down (dismiss keyboard if needed) to reveal Username/Password
      6. fill Username, Password, and IPSec identifier if Save remains disabled
      7. tap Save
    success_signal: New profile appears in VPN list
    fallback: If Save grayed, fill IPSec identifier or other hidden required fields
  MODIFY_WIFI_NETWORK_DETAILS:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. click(Network & internet) -> click(Internet)
      2. ensure Wi-Fi toggle is ON, wait for scan if needed
      3. tap gear icon next to target network (or open Saved networks then network)
      4. toggle Auto-connect / change Network usage / tap Forget as needed
    success_signal: Network details reflect changes; network removed from saved list if forgotten
  SET_PRIVATE_DNS:
    preconditions: network_internet
    steps:
      1. click(Private DNS)
      2. select desired mode (Off / Automatic / Private DNS provider hostname)
      3. type hostname if applicable
      4. click Save
    success_signal: Private DNS row shows new mode/hostname
  CHANGE_HOTSPOT_NAME:
    preconditions: network_internet
    steps:
      1. click(Hotspot & tethering) -> click(Wi-Fi hotspot)
      2. click(Hotspot name)
      3. long-press existing text to select, type new name
      4. click OK
    success_signal: Hotspot name field shows new value
  CONFIGURE_NEARBY_SHARE:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. click(Connected devices) -> click(Connection preferences)
      2. click(Nearby Share)
      3. toggle Use Nearby Share
      4. click(Device visibility) -> select Everyone/Contacts/Hidden
    success_signal: Toggle ON and visibility selection highlighted
  CHANGE_APP_BATTERY_USAGE_PROFILE:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. click(Apps) -> click(See all N apps)
      2. search or scroll to find target app
      3. click(target app) -> click(App battery usage)
      4. select Unrestricted/Optimized/Restricted
    success_signal: Selected radio active
    fallback: Use search to avoid scrolling errors
  CLEAR_APP_STORAGE_OR_CACHE:
    preconditions: app_info
    steps:
      1. click(Storage & cache)
      2. click(Clear storage) or click(Clear cache)
      3. confirm Delete on dialog if shown
    success_signal: Cache/storage value shows 0 B; buttons become disabled
  UNINSTALL_APP_VIA_INFO:
    preconditions: app_info
    steps:
      1. click(Uninstall)
      2. confirm OK on dialog
    success_signal: App icon removed from drawer
  TOGGLE_APP_NOTIFICATION_DOT:
    preconditions: app_info
    steps:
      1. click(Notifications)
      2. scroll if needed to find Allow notification dot
      3. tap toggle
    success_signal: Toggle state flips (gray when off)
    fallback: If tap on toggle fails, tap label area instead
  REVOKE_APP_PERMISSION:
    preconditions: app_info
    steps:
      1. click(Permissions)
      2. click(target permission under Allowed)
      3. select 'Don't allow'
      4. confirm 'Don't allow anyway' if warning appears
    success_signal: Permission appears under Not allowed
  CHANGE_DEFAULT_APP:
    preconditions: apps_main
    steps:
      1. click(Default apps)
      2. click target category (Browser/SMS/Phone/Home)
      3. tap desired app radio
    success_signal: Radio selected and parent row reflects new default
  CONFIGURE_DND_INTERRUPTIONS:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. click(Sound & vibration) -> click(Do Not Disturb)
      2. click(People) to set Messages and Calls allowances
      3. click(Alarms & other interruptions) to toggle Alarms/Media/Touch sounds/Reminders/Calendar events
      4. for Apps section, drill in to revoke per-app interruptions
    success_signal: DND subsections reflect required state (e.g., 'No one can interrupt', 'Alarms and media can interrupt')
  SET_DND_HIDDEN_NOTIFICATIONS_DISPLAY:
    preconditions: dnd_main
    steps:
      1. scroll to Display options for hidden notifications
      2. tap entry, choose desired option
    success_signal: Selected option highlighted
    fallback: Re-tap if first tap doesn't register at bottom of screen
  SET_APP_DAILY_TIMER:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. scroll down, click(Digital Wellbeing & parental controls)
      2. click(Dashboard)
      3. scroll to target app
      4. tap hourglass icon next to app
      5. tap hour/min picker fields, type values
      6. click OK
    success_signal: Toast 'App timer set for X' and hourglass shows duration
  QUERY_SCREEN_TIME:
    preconditions: digital_wellbeing
    steps:
      1. view summary on Digital Wellbeing main
      2. click(Dashboard) for per-app breakdown
      3. scroll to target app(s)
      4. optionally change dropdown to 'Times opened'
    success_signal: Required values are visible to answer
  BLOCK_NUMBER_IN_PHONE_APP:
    preconditions: phone_app
    steps:
      1. open three-dot menu -> Settings
      2. click(Blocked numbers)
      3. click(Add a number)
      4. type phone number
      5. click(Block)
    success_signal: Number appears in blocked list
    fallback: If input field empty after dialog reopen, tap field to focus then retype
  CREATE_CONTACT:
    preconditions: contacts_app
    steps:
      1. tap + (Create new contact)
      2. fill First name, Last name, Phone
      3. tap Save
      4. optionally tap star icon to favorite
    success_signal: Contact appears in list with star if favorited
    fallback: If number rejected (e.g., emergency number), substitute placeholder number
  QUERY_APP_STORAGE_USAGE:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. click(Apps) -> click(See all N apps) or use search
      2. open target app
      3. click(Storage & cache)
      4. read User data / Cache / Total
    success_signal: Numeric values visible to report
    fallback: For system apps, in All apps use three-dot menu -> Show system
  FORGET_WIFI_NETWORK:
    preconditions: settings_main
    steps:
      1. Network & internet -> Internet -> Saved networks
      2. tap target network
      3. verify Security if conditional
      4. tap Forget
    success_signal: Network removed from Saved networks list
  CONFIGURE_HOME_SETTINGS:
    preconditions: home_screen
    steps:
      1. long-press empty area of home screen
      2. tap Home settings
      3. toggle Notification dots / Add app icons / Allow rotation
      4. tap Suggestions submenu and disable 'Suggestions on Home screen'
    success_signal: Toggles persist as expected (re-enter to verify)
    fallback: Decline 'Get app suggestions' prompt with 'No thanks'
DEAD_ENDS:
  at battery_usage: tap specific 2-hour time slot on chart fails  [Data unavailable shortly after full charge; chart shows placeholder. Cannot select sub-period.]
  at vpn_edit_profile: click Save while button disabled fails  [Required fields (Username, Password, IPSec identifier) hidden under keyboard; must fill all to enable Save]
  at contacts_create: save contact with emergency phone number (e.g., 911) fails  [System blocks saving emergency numbers; use placeholder digits]
  at app_notifications: tap notification toggle precisely fails  [Toggle hit-target small; repeated taps may not register. Tap row label instead]
  at app_drawer: horizontal swipe to next page fails  [App drawer scrolls vertically, not paginated horizontally]
  at all_apps_list: search for system app like 'Android System Intelligence' fails  [System apps hidden by default; must enable 'Show system' from three-dot menu]
  at quick_settings: click gear from partially expanded shade fails  [Settings gear only visible after second swipe down to fully expand]
  at internet_wifi_list: open network details immediately after enabling Wi-Fi fails  [Need to wait for scan to complete before networks appear]
  at all_apps_list: tap top app expecting target app fails  [Easy to misclick adjacent alphabetical entries (e.g., AndroidWorld vs Android Auto)]

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 2: GENERIC  (transferable, app-agnostic)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
CATEGORY: NAVIGATE_TO
  precondition: Agent is somewhere in the OS (home, drawer, or another settings page)
  abstract_steps:
    1. Determine target settings section based on instruction keyword
    2. Reach top-level settings (via app drawer or quick-settings gear)
    3. Drill down through hierarchical menu, scrolling when target row not visible
    4. Use search affordance when present to bypass long lists
    5. Verify arrival by reading screen header
  failure_modes:
    - 'Misclick on adjacent menu row'
    - 'Target section requires scrolling and is missed'
    - 'Wrong sibling section opened (e.g., similar names)'
    - 'Quick-settings entry partially expanded so shortcut not visible'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Header text matches target section'
    - 'Expected child controls are visible'
    - 'Back navigation returns to the correct parent'

CATEGORY: TOGGLE_SETTING
  precondition: On a settings page that contains the toggle for the target feature
  abstract_steps:
    1. Locate the row containing the toggle (scroll if needed)
    2. Observe current state of the toggle
    3. Tap the toggle (or the row label as a larger hit target)
    4. Confirm any modal dialog if prompted
  failure_modes:
    - 'Tap misses small toggle hit area'
    - 'Visual state lags so user retoggles back'
    - 'Confirmation dialog dismissed accidentally'
    - 'Setting depends on another precondition (e.g., parent toggle off)'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Toggle visual indicates desired state'
    - 'Subtext under setting reflects change'
    - 'Re-entering screen still shows new state'

CATEGORY: SELECT_OPTION_FROM_LIST
  precondition: A radio/checkbox chooser dialog or screen is visible
  abstract_steps:
    1. Scan options to find one matching instruction
    2. Tap the option's radio/checkbox
    3. Confirm with Save/OK if dialog provides such button
  failure_modes:
    - 'Selecting nearest visible option instead of exact match'
    - 'Forgetting to confirm with Save/OK causing no persistence'
    - 'Option disabled because of an unmet precondition'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Chosen option shows selected indicator'
    - 'Parent row subtext reflects new choice'

CATEGORY: EDIT_ENTRY
  precondition: Editable text field is accessible (may require focusing field)
  abstract_steps:
    1. Tap the field to focus and bring up keyboard
    2. Select existing text if needed (long-press) and overwrite
    3. Type the new value
    4. Confirm via OK/Save/Done
  failure_modes:
    - 'Keyboard hides Save button preventing tap'
    - 'Field still considered empty due to focus issue'
    - 'Save remains disabled because other required fields not yet filled'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Field displays the new value'
    - 'Save button becomes enabled'
    - 'Parent screen subtext updates'

CATEGORY: ADD_ENTRY
  precondition: On a list screen with affordance to add a new item (+ button or 'Add' entry)
  abstract_steps:
    1. Tap the add affordance to open the creation form
    2. Fill all required fields
    3. Reveal hidden required fields by dismissing keyboard/scrolling
    4. Submit via Save
    5. Handle validation errors (e.g., add missing required field)
  failure_modes:
    - 'Save remains disabled due to hidden mandatory fields'
    - 'Validation rejects a specific value (must substitute)'
    - 'Form resets due to navigation error'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'New entry visible in list after save'
    - 'No error toast'
    - 'Re-open entry to confirm fields persisted'

CATEGORY: DELETE_ENTRY
  precondition: Detail view of the item contains a delete/forget/uninstall/clear affordance
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the entry's detail page
    2. Tap the destructive action button
    3. Confirm in any warning dialog
  failure_modes:
    - 'Confirmation dialog dismissed instead of confirmed'
    - 'Action button hidden until scrolling'
    - 'System protection prevents deletion (e.g., system app)'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Item no longer appears in parent list'
    - 'Sizes / counts reset to zero where applicable'

CATEGORY: QUERY_INFO
  precondition: Required value resides on some detail page within Settings
  abstract_steps:
    1. Navigate to the relevant settings section
    2. Read the visible value associated with the requested label
    3. When multiple values needed, navigate or scroll to gather all
    4. Combine and format the answer per instruction
  failure_modes:
    - 'Misreading a similarly named field'
    - 'Required value not yet populated (e.g., recently charged)'
    - "Hidden under system filter / requires 'Show system'"
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Value matches the on-screen label exactly'
    - 'Units included when requested'
    - 'All requested datapoints reported'

CATEGORY: CONFIGURE_PER_ITEM
  precondition: There is a per-item settings page accessible from a list (e.g., per-app)
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the list of items
    2. Use search or scroll to find the target
    3. Open its detail page
    4. Apply changes via TOGGLE_SETTING, SELECT_OPTION_FROM_LIST, or EDIT_ENTRY
  failure_modes:
    - 'Wrong item opened due to similar names'
    - 'Target item filtered out (system app hidden)'
    - "Item not in 'Recently opened' shortcut list"
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Detail page header matches the target item'
    - 'Modified value persists after navigating away and back'

CATEGORY: RECOVER_FROM_WRONG_SCREEN
  precondition: Agent has navigated to an unintended screen or app
  abstract_steps:
    1. Use Back button to step out of unintended screen
    2. If too deep or wrong app entirely, press Home to reset
    3. Re-execute the intended navigation strategy
  failure_modes:
    - 'Back navigation skips too far'
    - 'Repeated misclicks on the same wrong row'
    - 'Confusing similar app names'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Reach the intended screen as confirmed by header'
    - 'Original task progress not lost (re-verify prior state)'

DeleteEventAskUserTask.text:
# App guidance
The following workflow knowledge was learned from this app or related apps of the same category. Use it to plan; it describes WHAT to do at a high level, not exact coordinates — you still must look at the screenshot to ground each action.

## For [Calendar]  (category: Productivity, source: pretrained)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 2: GENERIC  (transferable, app-agnostic)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
L_C CATEGORY: Productivity
CATEGORY: ADD_ENTRY
  precondition: Application is open at its main list/collection screen and the target container (list/category/folder) is reachable from the main navigation
  abstract_steps:
    1. Navigate to the target container if entries are scoped to one
    2. Invoke the primary create affordance (typically a floating add control or compose control)
    3. Choose the entry subtype/variant if multiple are offered
    4. Focus the title/name field and enter the required text, replacing any default placeholder explicitly
    5. Focus secondary fields (body, metadata, description) and fill required values
    6. Open and configure structured pickers (date, time, recurrence, reminder, priority, tags, location, category/color) via their respective rows
    7. For each property choose either a quick preset or open an advanced picker
    8. Confirm each picker sub-dialog
    9. Persist via explicit save/confirm control or by exiting the editor (auto-save)
    10. Dismiss any post-save warning/disclaimer dialogs
  failure_modes:
    - "Tapping placeholder text that isn't interactive instead of using the primary create affordance"
    - 'Typing before the input field is focused so text is dropped or goes into wrong widget'
    - 'Creating in the wrong container because navigation was skipped'
    - 'Selecting wrong subtype (e.g., note vs task, file vs folder, regular vs quick)'
    - 'Missing required configuration that blocks save'
    - 'Default placeholder name conflicts with an existing entry causing silent failure'
    - 'Typing without first replacing the default leads to concatenated values'
    - 'Tapping outside an open menu dismisses it instead of selecting an option'
    - 'Forgetting to dismiss a post-save dialog leaves entry uncommitted'
    - 'Default values (date/time/reminder) not changed to match the requested values'
    - 'Imprecise taps on circular pickers select neighboring values'
    - 'Pressing back before saving discards the entry'
    - 'Quick presets not matching the required value, requiring advanced picker'
    - '24-hour vs 12-hour confusion when entering times'
  verification_checklist:
    - "New entry visible in the target container's list at the correct slot"
    - 'Title and content match the requested values'
    - 'Subtype indicator (e.g., checkbox for tasks) is correct'
    - 'No error/toast indicating save failure'
    - 'No duplicate-name error dialogs are present'
    - 'All requested attributes match when entry is reopened'
    - 'No leftover blocking dialog remains on screen'
    - 'Displayed metadata (date/time/priority badges) matches input'
    - 'Reopening the entry shows all configured fields persisted'

CATEGORY: EDIT_ENTRY
  precondition: Target entry exists and can be opened from a list or reached via search
  abstract_steps:
    1. Locate the entry via list scroll or text search
    2. Open the entry to viewer/detail mode (avoiding completion/delete affordances)
    3. Switch to edit mode via edit affordance
    4. Position cursor at the desired location (end of text for append, select all for replace)
    5. If replacing content, select all existing content and delete it
    6. Insert formatting markers BEFORE typing text where toolbar buttons may misbehave
    7. Type or replace text, using underlying markup directly when toolbar buttons split across lines
    8. Adjust structured pickers as required
    9. Confirm any sub-dialogs that appear
    10. Persist changes via the explicit save control or by exiting editor
  failure_modes:
    - 'Cursor lands inside an existing word leading to corrupted text'
    - "Typing inserts instead of replacing when text isn't selected"
    - 'Edit mode not entered so input is ignored'
    - 'Accidentally opening wrong entry with similar name'
    - 'Toolbar formatting buttons insert on new line, splitting the intended single-line entry'
    - 'Autocorrect/auto-list continuation causes duplicated prefixes'
    - 'Saving forgotten, leaving unsaved-changes indicator active'
    - 'Typing into a field without selecting existing text causes concatenation'
    - 'Stale cached lists do not reflect the change visually until reopened'
    - 'Save action overlaps with a dialog that must be dismissed first'
    - 'Tapping the wrong row item (e.g., adjacent entry) opens incorrect detail'
    - 'Tapping a status checkbox marks complete instead of opening detail'
    - 'Unsaved changes lost when navigating back without confirmation'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Viewer/detail mode shows updated text'
    - 'No leftover artifacts from previous content'
    - 'Entry still exists in the same container'
    - 'Rendered/raw content matches the requested formatting'
    - 'Save indicator returns to a neutral state (e.g., disabled/greyed)'
    - 'Reopening the entry shows the persisted/updated values'
    - 'Overview/list view badges update to reflect changes (e.g., new color/label/time)'
    - 'No unsaved-changes prompt appears on subsequent navigation'

CATEGORY: DELETE_OR_COMPLETE_ENTRY
  precondition: Entry/task is visible in a list and supports a completion or delete action, or can be opened to its detail screen
  abstract_steps:
    1. Locate target via scroll or search
    2. Tap the dedicated completion checkbox/status toggle, or open detail and use the delete control
    3. For bulk delete: enter multi-select mode via long-press on a target, tap each additional matching item, scroll to confirm no further matches are hidden below the fold
    4. Invoke delete and confirm in the confirmation dialog
    5. If multiple items, repeat for each
  failure_modes:
    - 'List reorders after each action causing misclicks on next item'
    - 'Filter hides completed items immediately, making verification harder'
    - 'Tapping the row instead of the checkbox opens the entry'
    - 'Tap location too close to text opens detail instead of toggling'
    - 'Bulk operations require menu access not always discoverable'
    - 'Missing items hidden by scroll'
    - 'Accidentally selecting non-matching items'
    - 'Dismissing the confirmation dialog instead of confirming'
    - 'Deleting a different occurrence when the entry is recurring'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Checkbox shows checked state or item removed from active list'
    - 'Item count decreased as expected'
    - 'Entry disappears from active list or appears struck-through in completed section'
    - 'Confirmation toast displayed'
    - 'Target items no longer appear in the list'
    - 'No remaining items match the deletion criterion'
    - 'No error toast displayed'
    - 'Search by its identifier returns no result'

CATEGORY: RENAME_ENTRY
  precondition: Entry is selectable in a list
  abstract_steps:
    1. Select the entry to expose contextual actions
    2. Open the rename control
    3. Explicitly select-all current text before typing the new name
    4. Confirm the rename
  failure_modes:
    - 'New text is prepended/appended because old text was not fully selected'
    - 'Forgetting required file extension'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Entry now displays the exact new name including extension'
    - 'No conflict dialog appears'

CATEGORY: QUERY_INFO
  precondition: Data of interest exists somewhere in the app and is browsable or searchable
  abstract_steps:
    1. Navigate to the relevant section/view (date, settings page, collection screen, etc.) or use search
    2. Use search or scroll to locate target/matching entries
    3. Open entry if needed to read full content or hidden fields
    4. Read the displayed value verbatim from list row or detail
    5. Aggregate (count/sum/extract) the requested field/value across scrolled views carefully to avoid double counting
    6. Return the answer in the requested format
  failure_modes:
    - 'Mis-counting items by confusing similar subtypes'
    - 'Scrolling past target items'
    - 'Reading a stale cached view'
    - 'Opening the entry instead of reading list-level metadata'
    - 'Confusing similar-looking fields'
    - 'Truncated labels in compact views hide full text; need detail/search view'
    - 'Scrollable lists may have items off-screen; failing to scroll causes undercount'
    - 'Confusing similar items (e.g., events spanning midnight assigned to wrong day)'
    - 'Over- or under-counting due to large scroll jumps'
    - 'Confusing similar-looking date labels (relative vs absolute)'
    - 'Treating completed/struck-through entries as active or vice versa'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Answer matches text visible on screen'
    - 'Distinguished correct subtype (e.g., task vs note) when relevant'
    - "Answer formatting matches the prompt's expectation"
    - 'All matching items inspected via scroll/search'
    - 'Scrolled through entire list at least once in both directions'
    - 'Distinct entries counted exactly once'

CATEGORY: NAVIGATE_TO
  precondition: Device home screen, another app, or current app state from which target screen/date is reachable
  abstract_steps:
    1. Verify target app identity before launching (icon ambiguity is common)
    2. Return to home if necessary
    3. Open the all-apps drawer if the target app is not pinned
    4. Scroll to find target app (alphabetical)
    5. Launch the target app and wait for splash to settle, verifying its label
    6. Open primary navigation (drawer/menu) or use bottom navigation / top menu
    7. Use header pickers, arrow controls, or search to jump to the target container/section/date
    8. Prefer direct taps over swipes inside dialog pickers
    9. Select target container or section and confirm navigation (e.g., OK)
    10. Confirm header/title matches target
  failure_modes:
    - 'Tapping wrong icon (top-right vs top-left)'
    - 'Opening a similarly named item by accident'
    - 'Launching a visually similar but different app'
    - 'Acting on splash screen before UI is interactive'
    - 'Assuming a feature exists under a menu that only holds unrelated entries'
    - 'Swipe gestures inside picker dialogs dismiss them'
    - 'Multiple consecutive month navigations are slow vs. using a year/month picker'
    - 'Splash screen still loading - need to wait'
    - 'Network/sync errors blocking initial entry'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Header reflects target name'
    - 'Expected list/content for that section is visible'
    - 'App title/header matches the intended app'
    - 'The active tab/section indicator highlights the target screen'
    - 'Expected screen-specific controls are visible'
    - "App's main screen rendered with expected widgets"
    - 'Subsequent operations occur in the correct context'

CATEGORY: CONFIGURE_VIEW
  precondition: On a list/main screen that supports view options (sort/group/filter affordances)
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the sort/filter/view configuration affordance (often a dedicated icon, not the overflow menu)
    2. Tap the dimension to change (grouping / sorting / completed sorting)
    3. Select the desired sort key or option from the option sheet
    4. Toggle direction, visibility flags, or boolean preferences (e.g., move-completed-to-bottom) as needed
    5. Close menu and verify list reflects settings
  failure_modes:
    - 'Forgetting to disable reverse-order toggle'
    - 'Looking for options in global settings rather than list view'
    - 'Menu closes after one selection requiring reopening'
    - 'Confusing overflow menu with sort menu'
    - 'Selection not registering and needing a retry'
    - 'Settings scoped per-list and not global'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'List ordering matches desired key/direction'
    - 'Visibility toggles produce the expected filtered list'
    - 'Reopening the menu confirms persisted selections'
    - 'Configuration sheet displays the chosen labels'
    - 'List visibly re-orders/regroups to reflect selection'

CATEGORY: CONFIGURE_SETTINGS
  precondition: App opened; settings reachable
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the overflow/options menu and enter Settings (gear or equivalent)
    2. Drill into the appropriate category, scrolling if needed
    3. Select the target setting and choose the desired value from the dialog
    4. Toggle/select the new value
    5. Verify the change persists
  failure_modes:
    - 'Looking for the setting under an unrelated category'
    - 'Closing the dialog without selecting'
    - "Setting hidden behind a parent option (e.g., theme must be 'Custom' to expose color choices)"
    - 'Tap registers on adjacent option due to dense layout'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Updated value displayed beneath the setting name'
    - 'Setting visually reflects the new state'
    - 'Behavior change observed on next relevant action/launch'

CATEGORY: CREATE_CONTAINER
  precondition: App supports user-defined containers (notebooks/categories)
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open navigation drawer or relevant management screen
    2. Invoke 'create new container' action
    3. Enter container name
    4. Save
  failure_modes:
    - 'Required dependent settings missing (e.g., region/language) blocking creation'
    - 'Container created but not auto-selected, causing subsequent items to land in wrong place'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'New container appears in list'
    - 'Subsequent additions show inside it'

CATEGORY: MANAGE_CATEGORY
  precondition: Settings exposes a 'manage categories/types' area
  abstract_steps:
    1. Navigate into the category management screen
    2. Add a new category or edit an existing one
    3. Set its name and visual attribute (e.g., color via preset or hex)
    4. Save and verify presence in the list
  failure_modes:
    - 'Closing the dialog without selecting a color leaves default'
    - 'Saving without filling required name field'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Category appears with correct name and color'
    - 'Category can be assigned to entries'

CATEGORY: ATTACH_MEDIA
  precondition: Editor supports media attachment and external camera/gallery is available
  abstract_steps:
    1. Tap the media/attach control
    2. Choose source (camera vs gallery)
    3. Configure capture options if needed
    4. Confirm and return to editor
    5. Save entry
  failure_modes:
    - 'Permission dialogs interrupt flow'
    - 'Accidentally tapping image area dismisses or opens unintended picker'
    - 'Source returns no recent items'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Media preview visible in editor'
    - 'Entry saved with media attached'

CATEGORY: ATTACH_LOCATION
  precondition: In editor with location field; device supports map services
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open location picker
    2. Center map on current position or search
    3. Grant location permission if requested
    4. Accept any certificate or trust prompts
    5. Confirm selection
  failure_modes:
    - 'Map fails to load due to untrusted certificate'
    - 'Permission denial blocks current-location fix'
    - 'Internal errors after selection require retrying'
  verification_checklist:
    - "Address text appears in the editor's location row"
    - 'Map reopens with same pin if revisited'

CATEGORY: SET_REMINDER
  precondition: Entry supports an alarm/notification feature
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open entry options/overflow menu
    2. Select alarm/reminder option
    3. Pick date and time
    4. Confirm/save the alarm
    5. Grant notification permission if prompted
  failure_modes:
    - "Skipping permission grant means alarms won't fire"
    - 'Confusing date confirmation with final save'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Alarm indicator visible on entry'
    - 'System permission granted'

CATEGORY: SET_DATE_TIME
  precondition: In an editor with a date/time row
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the date/time picker via the date row
    2. Choose a date via calendar navigation or preset
    3. Choose a time via preset, analog clock, or keyboard-numeric entry
    4. Account for 24-hour clock when converting AM/PM
    5. Confirm sub-dialogs in order (time then combined date+time)
  failure_modes:
    - 'Selecting AM time when PM intended'
    - 'Picker dialog confirmations skipped, losing selection'
    - 'Calendar arrow navigation overshooting target month'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Editor row shows the selected absolute date and time'
    - 'Reopening the picker shows the same selection highlighted'

CATEGORY: SET_CUSTOM_RECURRENCE
  precondition: In an editor where simple presets are insufficient
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open recurrence menu and choose Custom
    2. Set numeric interval, carefully handling text-field editing
    3. Choose unit (day/week/month/year)
    4. Select specific days of week or month if applicable
    5. Choose end condition (never, on date, after N occurrences)
    6. Apply via back/confirm control
  failure_modes:
    - 'Numeric field appends instead of replacing, producing wrong interval'
    - 'Forgetting to select end condition leaves it as Never'
    - "Confusing two identical letter buttons (e.g., two 'T' for Tue/Thu)"
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Editor summary line accurately reflects interval, days, and end condition'

CATEGORY: SEARCH_OR_FILTER
  precondition: On a screen that exposes a search/filter affordance
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the search/filter dialog
    2. Enter the query string
    3. Toggle option flags (case sensitivity, regex, scope, stop-after-first) as required
    4. Note that some options only appear once a parent option is enabled
    5. Execute the search and inspect results
  failure_modes:
    - 'Treating regex metacharacters as literals (or vice versa) due to wrong flag state'
    - 'Submit gestures passing through dialog to background triggering unexpected popups'
    - 'Required option hidden behind a parent toggle'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Query and option flags reflect the request'
    - 'Match count or filtered list confirms expected scope'
    - "Empty-result indicator distinguishes 'no match' from dialog dismissal"

CATEGORY: FIND_AND_REPLACE
  precondition: Entry is open in an editor that supports find/replace
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the search dialog and transition to the replace variant if separate
    2. Enter the find pattern and replacement string in their respective fields
    3. Configure regex/multiline flags as required, escaping characters appropriately
    4. Verify a positive match count before executing
    5. Execute replace-all and inspect the document
  failure_modes:
    - 'Match count remains zero because of regex flag mismatch or empty target'
    - 'Dialog closes unexpectedly due to misplaced taps; pattern is typed into the document instead'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Replacement is visible in the rendered/raw content'
    - 'No occurrences of the original pattern remain (for replace-all)'
    - 'Document saved if persistence is required'

CATEGORY: TOGGLE_VIEW_MODE
  precondition: Entry is open in an editor that has edit/preview modes
  abstract_steps:
    1. Tap the mode-toggle control
    2. Confirm the alternate icon appears indicating the new mode
  failure_modes:
    - 'Misidentifying the mode toggle among toolbar icons'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Rendered content is visible when in preview'
    - 'Toggle icon now offers the inverse action'

CATEGORY: EXPORT_OR_PRINT
  precondition: Print/export action available from menu
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the overflow menu and choose Print/Export
    2. Select destination (e.g., Save as PDF)
    3. Adjust output options after destination is set
    4. Trigger save and confirm in file dialog
  failure_modes:
    - 'Output options remain disabled until destination is selected'
    - 'Multiple rapid taps on save button may re-open creation flows after return'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'File save dialog closes successfully'
    - 'Returned to the originating screen'

DeleteMessagesAskUserTask.text:
# App guidance
The following workflow knowledge was learned from this app or related apps of the same category. Use it to plan; it describes WHAT to do at a high level, not exact coordinates — you still must look at the screenshot to ground each action.

## For [Messages]  (category: Communication, source: pretrained)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 2: GENERIC  (transferable, app-agnostic)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
L_C CATEGORY: Communication
CATEGORY: NAVIGATE_TO
  precondition: Starting at home or app's root, or at some default landing screen; user knows the destination screen exists within the app
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the app drawer if app shortcut not on home
    2. Launch target app
    3. Dismiss permission prompts and onboarding tooltips
    4. Identify if target location is a virtual category or a physical path
    5. From the current screen, identify the likely entry point (top-bar icon, menu item, settings row, primary navigation menu)
    6. Select the appropriate top-level destination
    7. Drill down through sub-folders/tabs/menus toward the target screen
    8. If the resulting screen is wrong, back out and try the next candidate, iterating through known entry points (info icon, gear, overflow) systematically
    9. Confirm target screen is visible
  failure_modes:
    - 'Confusing a category filter applied within the current folder with global navigation to that category'
    - 'Opening the wrong adjacent item due to imprecise tap coordinates'
    - 'Swipe gesture interpreted as long-press, opening home customization menu'
    - 'Launching a similarly-named but wrong app (e.g. dialer vs. contacts manager)'
    - 'Tooltip overlays obscuring desired control'
    - 'Confusing icons with similar appearance'
    - 'Getting trapped in modal dialogs (permissions, defaults) that close the app on cancel'
    - 'Mis-tapping on adjacent UI elements'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Header/breadcrumb/page title reflects the intended destination'
    - 'Visible content matches expectations for that location'
    - 'Expected controls are interactive'
    - "Target screen's distinguishing visual cues are present"
    - 'Back navigation returns to a known prior screen'

CATEGORY: QUERY_INFO
  precondition: Target item, list, or information is reachable somewhere in the app
  abstract_steps:
    1. Navigate to the most likely container screen (list / detail / about / settings / tab / help)
    2. Optionally apply filters or search to narrow the view
    3. Use search or scroll to locate the data
    4. Read the requested attribute/value/count/status from the list card, item-detail/info screen, or rendered UI
    5. Return the value in the requested format
  failure_modes:
    - 'Reading from a filtered subset that excludes the target'
    - 'Confusing modification time with creation time'
    - 'Counting items while extra filters are still active'
    - 'Misreading empty-state as a value other than zero'
    - 'Filter not applied, leading to wrong count'
    - 'Information located in a different app than expected'
    - 'Reading truncated preview text instead of the full content'
    - 'Assuming a value from the list when the detail differs'
    - 'Searching with overly strict formatting (e.g., punctuation) and getting no results'
    - 'Looking in the wrong menu (overflow vs info icon vs gear)'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Value taken from the authoritative detail view when precision is needed'
    - 'All required filters are active and only those'
    - 'Result reported in the requested units/format'
    - 'Source screen clearly shows the answered value'
    - 'Empty-state messages map to 0/None'
    - 'Value matches the literal text shown on screen'
    - 'If multiple matches exist, the correct contextual one was chosen'

CATEGORY: SEARCH_ENTRY
  precondition: App provides a search affordance and/or filter chips on a listing view
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the search interface or tap filter chip
    2. Type the query string or provide selection
    3. Optionally apply category/type filters
    4. Submit if needed (keyboard enter)
    5. Inspect results or empty state
  failure_modes:
    - 'Searching within a narrower scope than intended'
    - 'Typing into a non-focused field (accidentally editing content)'
    - 'Chip is off-screen; needs horizontal swipe'
    - 'Search not executed because submit not pressed'
    - 'No results misinterpreted'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Query text shown in the search bar'
    - 'Applied filters are highlighted/active'
    - 'Result list (or explicit no-match state) is visible'

CATEGORY: DELETE_HISTORY_ENTRY
  precondition: Search interface exposes recent queries
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open search, ensure input is empty so history is shown
    2. Locate the target history row
    3. Tap the per-row dismiss control
  failure_modes:
    - 'Target entry not present (already cleared or never recorded)'
    - 'Confusing executing a new search with viewing history'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Target row no longer appears in the history list'

CATEGORY: CHANGE_VIEW_OR_SORT
  precondition: List/grid view is currently shown
  abstract_steps:
    1. Locate the layout toggle or overflow menu
    2. Toggle layout or pick the desired sort criterion
    3. Confirm the visible change
  failure_modes:
    - 'Misreading the toggle icon (it represents the alternate mode, not the current one)'
    - 'Selection mode blocking interaction with view controls'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Items visibly re-arranged in target layout/order'
    - 'Toggle icon now shows the opposite state'

CATEGORY: ADD_ENTRY
  precondition: User is in a list-style or writable container screen of the relevant data domain with an add affordance available, and permission/default-app prerequisites satisfied
  abstract_steps:
    1. Trigger the add-new-entry control (primary create affordance, floating action button, '+' icon, or overflow create menu)
    2. Choose the create-new option if a menu appears
    3. Focus each required input field explicitly before typing
    4. Type each piece of data into the corresponding field
    5. If a field's label/category is configurable, open its selector and choose the requested option
    6. Optionally attach media (capture or pick) via the dedicated picker dialog
    7. Dismiss the on-screen keyboard if it hides remaining fields (system back) or scroll the form
    8. If a follow-up form appears, fill remaining required fields
    9. Submit/save using the primary action (often top-right) or confirm with checkmark/OK
  failure_modes:
    - 'Attempting to create in a virtual/filtered view that disallows creation'
    - 'Submitting without entering a name'
    - 'Tapping near the avatar/header accidentally opens the photo picker'
    - 'Typing without focusing a field causes data loss or duplication'
    - 'Premature save with empty required fields triggers validation error'
    - 'Auto-suggested text or pre-existing text concatenates with typed text'
    - 'Tapping a similar icon that opens a different mode (e.g., add-participant vs add-contact)'
    - 'Forgetting to press the final Save/checkmark, leaving changes unpersisted'
    - 'Dismissing required permission/default-handler prompts and being kicked out of the app'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'New entry appears in the destination list or relevant screen'
    - 'Breadcrumb/location is the intended container'
    - 'Post-save detail view shows all entered values'
    - 'Confirmation toast/snackbar appears with entity name'
    - 'Configurable labels reflect chosen option'
    - 'Attached media renders as expected'
    - 'Returning to the list and re-opening shows the entry persisted'

CATEGORY: EDIT_ENTRY
  precondition: Target item can be selected and an action menu is reachable, or entry detail view is open
  abstract_steps:
    1. Long-press or otherwise select the item, or open the entity detail view
    2. Activate edit mode (e.g., pencil icon) or open the action menu and choose the edit/rename action
    3. Focus the field needing change
    4. Clear existing content via long-press select or backspace
    5. Type corrected value while preserving constraints (e.g., extensions)
    6. Scroll to reveal fields hidden by the keyboard
    7. Confirm/save the change
  failure_modes:
    - 'Single-tap inadvertently opens the item instead of selecting it'
    - 'Overwriting protected portions like the file extension'
    - 'Replacing text without selecting first causes append instead of overwrite'
    - 'Dismissing without saving loses edits'
    - 'Editing a similarly-named entity by mistake'
    - 'Keyboard obscuring fields, leading to no input'
    - 'Field unfocused at moment of typing, so input is lost'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Updated value appears in the list'
    - 'Constraints preserved (extension, type)'
    - 'Detail view reflects updated values'
    - 'No leftover duplicate characters'
    - 'Confirmation toast appears'
    - 'Re-entering edit mode shows persisted values'

CATEGORY: MOVE_OR_COPY_ENTRY
  precondition: Item is selectable; destination is accessible
  abstract_steps:
    1. Select the item and choose move/copy
    2. Navigate the destination picker to the target container
    3. Optionally create a new sub-container at the destination
    4. Confirm the operation
  failure_modes:
    - 'Confirming at the wrong directory (placing item in parent rather than new sub-folder)'
    - 'Cancelling by pressing back at the picker'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Source no longer contains the item (for move) or still contains it (for copy)'
    - 'Destination contains the item'

CATEGORY: DELETE_ENTRY
  precondition: Target item exists and is selectable/locatable via list, search, or detail view, and a delete action exists
  abstract_steps:
    1. Locate the target item (scroll or search)
    2. Enter selection or detail mode (long-press for list items, open detail for single items)
    3. Invoke the delete affordance (trash icon or overflow -> Delete)
    4. Confirm the destructive action in the confirmation dialog
  failure_modes:
    - 'Single-tap opening the item instead of selecting'
    - 'Cancelling the confirmation'
    - 'Entry not found -> nothing to delete (may already be absent)'
    - 'Confirmation dialog dismissed accidentally'
    - 'Selecting the wrong item due to similar names/numbers'
    - 'Confusing delete-thread with delete-message-content'
    - 'Repeating confirm taps because UI state did not refresh'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Toast/snackbar/feedback indicating deletion'
    - 'Item no longer appears in the list or search'
    - 'Empty-state text or updated count is shown'
    - 'No success toast indicates pending action; re-check to ensure removal'

CATEGORY: OPEN_WITH_EXTERNAL_APP
  precondition: System chooser is available for the item type
  abstract_steps:
    1. Trigger open action on the item
    2. Select desired handler app in the chooser
    3. Choose one-time or default association
  failure_modes:
    - "Confirming 'Always/Just once' before selecting an app (controls disabled)"
    - 'Chooser not appearing because a default is already set'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Target app launches with the item loaded'
    - 'If permanent default was requested, subsequent opens skip the chooser'

CATEGORY: EDIT_TEXT_DOCUMENT
  precondition: Document open in a text editor
  abstract_steps:
    1. Position cursor via tap or search tool
    2. Insert, delete, or replace content
    3. Optionally toggle preview to verify rendering
    4. Save changes
  failure_modes:
    - 'Edits made outside the intended region'
    - 'Forgetting to save (save indicator still active)'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Save indicator is inactive/greyed'
    - 'Reopen shows updated content'

CATEGORY: FIND_AND_REPLACE_IN_DOCUMENT
  precondition: Editor exposes a find/replace tool
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the search tool
    2. Switch to the find-and-replace mode if a simple search appears first
    3. Enter search and replacement strings
    4. Apply replace-all and save
  failure_modes:
    - 'Using a search-only dialog and missing the toggle to replace mode'
    - 'Replacing partial matches due to case/whole-word options'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Match count shown before replace'
    - 'Document content reflects all replacements'
    - 'File saved'

CATEGORY: FIND_TEXT_IN_RENDERED_PAGE
  precondition: Page is rendered in a browser-like viewer
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the browser menu
    2. Choose Find in page
    3. Type the query and read the match counter
    4. If counter is 0/0, ensure page is fully loaded/interacted with
  failure_modes:
    - 'Page not yet rendered when searching'
    - 'Dynamic content requiring interaction to appear'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Counter reflects expected occurrences'
    - 'Highlighted matches visible on page'

CATEGORY: SHARE_ENTRY
  precondition: Item selectable; share intent supported
  abstract_steps:
    1. Select the item
    2. Invoke share action
    3. Choose a sharing channel
    4. Complete channel-specific steps
  failure_modes:
    - 'Channel requires capability not present (e.g., no paired devices)'
    - 'Permissions or system toggles disabled'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Send/Completed indication from the share target'
    - 'If unable to complete, document the blocker and continue'

CATEGORY: CHANGE_SETTING
  precondition: On the app's settings/preferences area or system settings screen reachable from the app, or relevant setting exists in an overflow menu
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the overflow menu or settings screen within the relevant scope
    2. Locate the section containing the setting/preference (scroll if necessary)
    3. Tap the row/toggle to open chooser dialog or toggle directly
    4. Select desired option / flip toggle / input the desired value
    5. Confirm any follow-up dialog or save if required
  failure_modes:
    - 'Setting only applies within current scope/view'
    - 'Setting requires elevated permission'
    - 'Setting not present where expected (looking in wrong submenu)'
    - 'Dialog dismissed without selecting, leaving setting unchanged'
    - "Confusing 'system' vs 'app' setting locations"
    - 'Mistaking an adjacent option (e.g., icon color vs theme)'
    - 'Forgetting to press the final save control'
    - 'Triggering a warning dialog and not understanding it'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Menu reflects new state on reopen'
    - 'Content view reflects the new behavior'
    - 'Sub-label or toggle state reflects new value'
    - 'Returning to setting later still shows the value'
    - 'Visual effect (color, language) is applied across the UI'

CATEGORY: BLOCK_OR_RESTRICT_ITEM
  precondition: On a management screen exposing a block/restriction list
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the add-restriction control
    2. Focus the identifier input field explicitly
    3. Type the identifier
    4. Confirm via primary action button (only enabled when input populated)
  failure_modes:
    - 'Typing without focus leaves field empty and confirm disabled'
    - 'Toggling unrelated switches by mistake'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Item appears in restriction list'
    - 'Toggle states match intent'

CATEGORY: IMPORT_OR_EXPORT_DATA
  precondition: On management/tools screen offering import/export actions
  abstract_steps:
    1. Select the desired import/export action
    2. Use the file picker drawer to choose source/destination folder
    3. Confirm save or select file
  failure_modes:
    - 'Source has no data to import (empty SIM/file)'
    - 'File picker defaults to wrong location'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Confirmation toast or new file presence'
    - 'Or clear message indicating empty source'

CATEGORY: MARK_FAVORITE_OR_FLAG
  precondition: Entry detail view open with star/flag affordance
  abstract_steps:
    1. Tap the star/flag icon
    2. Verify icon state changed
  failure_modes:
    - 'Tapping wrong icon (overflow vs star)'
    - 'Icon state ambiguous; repeated taps may un-favorite'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Icon filled/highlighted'
    - 'Entry appears under favorites list'

CATEGORY: COMPOSE_AND_SEND_MESSAGE
  precondition: Messaging surface available and recipient identifiable
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open or create the target conversation by recipient identifier
    2. Focus the message input field
    3. Enter the message text
    4. Trigger the send control
    5. Verify the sent indicator (bubble + delivery mark) appears
  failure_modes:
    - 'Sending in the wrong thread because of a similar number'
    - 'Hitting send before text is committed'
    - 'Permissions/default-handler prompt blocking the send'
    - 'Typing into a different focused field (e.g., recipient instead of body)'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Outgoing bubble with exact text appears in the thread'
    - 'Delivery/sent indicator shown'
    - 'Recipient header matches target'

CATEGORY: HANDLE_PERMISSION_OR_DEFAULT_HANDLER_PROMPT
  precondition: App requires a system role or permission that has not yet been granted
  abstract_steps:
    1. Read the dialog and identify the required role/permission
    2. Select the correct option (often the target app's own entry)
    3. Press the affirmative confirm button
    4. Wait for app's main UI to load
  failure_modes:
    - 'Pressing cancel/back and getting bounced out of the app'
    - 'Selecting the wrong app in a chooser'
    - 'Repeatedly toggling the role and creating loops'
  verification_checklist:
    - "Dialog dismisses and app's main UI is visible"
    - 'Subsequent actions that depend on the role succeed'

DeleteUselessFilesAskUserTask.text:
# App guidance
The following workflow knowledge was learned from this app or related apps of the same category. Use it to plan; it describes WHAT to do at a high level, not exact coordinates — you still must look at the screenshot to ground each action.

## For [Files]  (app-specific FSM, source: pretrained)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 1: APP_SPECIFIC  (non-transferable)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
APP: files
CATEGORY: Tools
STATES:
  S0: HOME_SCREEN — Android device home screen
    visual_cues: ['app icons dock', 'Google search bar', 'wallpaper']
  S1: APP_DRAWER — Android app drawer listing all installed apps
    visual_cues: ['alphabetical app grid', 'search bar at top']
  S2: DOWNLOADS_FOLDER — Default Downloads folder view in Files app
    visual_cues: ["'Downloads' title header", 'filter chips (Images, Audio, Videos, Documents)', 'hamburger menu top-left', 'search icon top-right', 'three-dot menu top-right', 'view toggle icon', "'No items' when empty"]
    resource_hints: ['Downloads']
  S3: NAV_DRAWER — Side navigation drawer for switching categories/storage
    visual_cues: ['Recent', 'Images', 'Videos', 'Audio', 'Documents', 'Downloads', 'internal storage entry (e.g., sdk_gphone64_arm64)']
    resource_hints: ['Recent', 'Images', 'Videos', 'Audio', 'Documents', 'Downloads']
  S4: CATEGORY_VIEW — Aggregated category view (Images/Videos/Audio/Documents/Recent)
    visual_cues: ['category title header', "filter chips 'Large files', 'This week'", 'folder grid/list']
    resource_hints: ['Large files', 'This week']
  S5: INTERNAL_STORAGE_ROOT — Internal storage root directory
    visual_cues: ['device name title (e.g. sdk_gphone64_arm64)', 'system folders (Alarms, Android, DCIM, Documents, Download, Movies, Music, Pictures, Recordings, Ringtones)']
    resource_hints: ['sdk_gphone64_arm64']
  S6: SUBFOLDER_VIEW — Inside a specific subfolder (e.g., Recordings, Ringtones, Documents)
    visual_cues: ['breadcrumb path at top', 'filter chips', 'view toggle', 'three-dot menu']
  S7: OPTIONS_MENU — Overflow dropdown menu opened from three-dot icon
    visual_cues: ['New window', 'New folder', 'Sort by...', 'Select all', 'Get info', "Show hidden files / Don't show hidden files"]
    resource_hints: ['New folder', 'Sort by...', 'Show hidden files']
  S8: NEW_FOLDER_DIALOG — Dialog prompting for new folder name
    visual_cues: ["'New folder' title", "'Folder name' text field highlighted blue", 'OK/Cancel buttons']
    resource_hints: ['Folder name']
  S9: SORT_BY_SHEET — Bottom sheet with sort options
    visual_cues: ["'SORT BY' header", 'Name A-Z/Z-A', 'Modified newest/oldest first', 'Size largest/smallest first']
    resource_hints: ['Sort by']
  S10: SEARCH_VIEW — Search interface with input bar and filter chips
    visual_cues: ["active 'Search...' bar", 'filter chips row', 'search history list', 'on-screen keyboard']
    resource_hints: ['Search']
  S11: SEARCH_RESULTS — Search results with optional filters and scope indicator
    visual_cues: ['query in search bar', 'filter chip(s) highlighted', "'Files in <scope>' indicator", "results grid/list or 'No matches in <scope>'"]
  S12: LAUNCHER_NOT_RESPONDING_DIALOG — System dialog when launcher hangs
    visual_cues: ["'Pixel Launcher isn't responding'", 'Wait button', 'Close app button']
  S13: HOME_LONG_PRESS_MENU — Home screen long-press customization menu
    visual_cues: ['Wallpaper & style', 'Widgets', 'Home settings']
TRANSITIONS:
  S0 --swipe_up_from_bottom--> S1  [post: app drawer visible]
  S0 --long_press (accidental)--> S13  [post: customization menu shown]
  S13 --press_back--> S0
  S1 --click(Files app icon)--> S2  [post: Files app launches to Downloads]
  S2 --click(hamburger_menu)--> S3  [post: drawer open]
  S6 --click(hamburger_menu)--> S3
  S4 --click(hamburger_menu)--> S3
  S3 --click(category: Recent/Images/Videos/Audio/Documents)--> S4
  S3 --click(Downloads)--> S2
  S3 --click(device_internal_storage_entry)--> S5
  S5 --click(folder)--> S6  [post: enters folder]
  S2 --click(three_dot_menu)--> S7
  S6 --click(three_dot_menu)--> S7
  S5 --click(three_dot_menu)--> S7
  S7 --click(New folder)--> S8  [pre: physical directory (not category view)]  [post: dialog open]
  S7 --click(Sort by...)--> S9
  S7 --click(Show hidden files)--> S2  [post: hidden files toggled, menu closes]
  S8 --type(folder_name) then confirm--> S6  [post: new folder created]
  S9 --click(sort option)--> S2  [post: sort applied]
  S2 --click(search_icon)--> S10
  S4 --click(search_icon)--> S10
  S6 --click(search_icon)--> S10
  S10 --type(query) + enter/select_chip--> S11  [post: results limited to current scope]
  S11 --click(filter_chip: Images/Audio/Videos/Documents)--> S11  [post: filter toggled]
  S11 --press_back--> S2
  S2 --click(filter_chip)--> S2  [post: filter toggled in place]
  S2 --click(view_toggle)--> S2  [post: switches list/grid]
  S12 --click(Wait/Close app)--> S0  [post: dialog dismissed]
STRATEGIES:
  OPEN_FILES_APP:
    preconditions: On home screen
    steps:
      1. Swipe up from bottom to open app drawer
      2. Tap Files app icon
      3. Wait for app to load to Downloads view
    success_signal: Downloads header visible with filter chips
    fallback: If long-press menu appears, press Back; if launcher unresponsive dialog appears, click Wait or Close app and retry
  FILTER_IN_DOWNLOADS:
    preconditions: In Downloads folder
    steps:
      1. Tap desired filter chip (Images/Audio/Videos/Documents)
      2. Optionally tap additional chips to combine filters
      3. Verify chip(s) highlighted blue with checkmark
    success_signal: Chip(s) highlighted; either results shown or 'No matches in Downloads'
    fallback: If wrong scope, open hamburger menu and switch to global category
  NAVIGATE_TO_GLOBAL_CATEGORY:
    preconditions: Files app open
    steps:
      1. Tap hamburger menu top-left
      2. Tap desired category (Recent/Images/Videos/Audio/Documents)
      3. Verify category title in header
    success_signal: Header shows category name; aggregated folders/files appear
    fallback: If accidentally tapped wrong item, reopen drawer and re-select
  NAVIGATE_TO_INTERNAL_STORAGE_ROOT:
    preconditions: Files app open
    steps:
      1. Tap hamburger menu
      2. Tap device internal storage entry (e.g., sdk_gphone64_arm64)
      3. Verify standard root folders visible (Alarms, Android, DCIM, etc.)
    success_signal: Header shows device name; root folder grid visible
  CREATE_NEW_FOLDER:
    preconditions: Inside a physical directory (Downloads, internal storage, or a subfolder), NOT inside a category aggregate view
    steps:
      1. Tap three-dot overflow menu top-right
      2. Tap 'New folder'
      3. Type the folder name in the dialog text field
      4. Confirm (OK)
    success_signal: New folder appears in the directory listing
    fallback: If 'New folder' option not visible, navigate to internal storage or a real folder (category views like Audio/Documents do not allow creation)
  SORT_FILES:
    preconditions: Inside a folder
    steps:
      1. Tap three-dot menu
      2. Tap 'Sort by...'
      3. Select desired sort option (Name A-Z/Z-A, Modified newest/oldest, Size largest/smallest)
    success_signal: Sort sheet closes; chosen option marked as active when reopened
  TOGGLE_HIDDEN_FILES:
    preconditions: Inside a folder
    steps:
      1. Tap three-dot menu
      2. Tap 'Show hidden files'
    success_signal: Menu closes; reopening shows 'Don't show hidden files'
  TOGGLE_VIEW_LAYOUT:
    preconditions: Inside a folder/category with files
    steps:
      1. Locate view toggle icon on right side under filter chips
      2. Tap once to switch list<->grid
      3. Note: icon shown represents the OPPOSITE of current layout
    success_signal: File items rearrange between list rows and grid tiles
    fallback: If unclear, click toggle once more and observe layout change
  SEARCH_WITH_FILTER:
    preconditions: Files app open at desired scope (folder or category)
    steps:
      1. Tap search icon top-right
      2. Type query in search bar
      3. Optionally tap file-type filter chip(s)
      4. Submit via keyboard or wait for live results
    success_signal: Query shown in search bar; filter chip highlighted; results or 'No matches in <scope>' displayed
    fallback: If 'No matches', press back and broaden scope (switch to internal storage root or a global category), then re-search
  COUNT_OR_VERIFY_FILES:
    preconditions: Filtered/searched view
    steps:
      1. Scroll to ensure all matching items visible
      2. Count visible items
      3. Provide numeric answer or Yes/No based on presence
    success_signal: Answer matches displayed contents
    fallback: If list extends, scroll up and down to capture all entries
  REMOVE_SEARCH_HISTORY_ENTRY:
    preconditions: Search view open
    steps:
      1. Open search view from any scope
      2. Locate desired query in recent search history
      3. Tap the 'x' next to the entry to remove it
    success_signal: Entry no longer in history when search reopened
DEAD_ENDS:
  at category_view: Open three-dot menu seeking 'New folder' fails  [Aggregated category views (Audio/Images/Videos/Documents) do not expose 'New folder'. Must navigate to internal storage or a real subdirectory.]
  at downloads_folder: Tap filter chip expecting global scope fails  [Filter chips on Downloads only filter Downloads contents, not device-wide. Use hamburger menu to reach global category.]
  at search_results: Search within a specific empty folder fails  [Search scope is restricted to current folder (e.g., 'No matches in Downloads'). Back out and search from a broader scope.]
  at home_long_press_menu: Swipe up too slowly / from wrong area fails  [Triggers wallpaper/widgets menu instead of app drawer; press Back and retry with a clear bottom-up swipe.]
  at launcher_not_responding_dialog: Repeated swipes during launcher hang fails  [Causes 'Pixel Launcher isn't responding' dialog; select Wait or Close app to recover.]
  at search_view: Type before search field has focus fails  [Text input may not register; tap the search bar first to ensure focus before typing.]

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 2: GENERIC  (transferable, app-agnostic)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
CATEGORY: NAVIGATE_TO
  precondition: Application launched or accessible from launcher; target location identifiable in navigation hierarchy
  abstract_steps:
    1. Launch the app via launcher or app drawer if not in foreground
    2. Open primary navigation (side drawer/menu) if target is outside default landing
    3. Select the target top-level section or storage root
    4. Drill into subfolders by tapping their entries
    5. Confirm location via header/breadcrumb
  failure_modes:
    - 'Tapping a filter chip instead of switching the actual scope'
    - 'Selecting a similarly named adjacent item'
    - 'Confusing aggregated category views with physical directories'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Header/title matches target location'
    - 'Breadcrumb path reflects expected hierarchy'
    - 'Available actions match expected directory type'

CATEGORY: ADD_ENTRY
  precondition: Inside a writable container/directory that supports creation
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open overflow/options menu in the container
    2. Choose 'create new' action
    3. Enter the requested name in the prompted input
    4. Confirm creation
  failure_modes:
    - 'Attempting creation inside a read-only or aggregated/virtual view'
    - 'Submitting without focusing the input field'
    - 'Naming collisions or invalid characters'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'New entry visible in the current listing'
    - 'Name matches the requested string exactly'
    - 'Entry is located in the correct parent container'

CATEGORY: FILTER_ENTRIES
  precondition: Listing view with available filter controls
  abstract_steps:
    1. Identify filter chips or controls
    2. Toggle one or more filters relevant to the request
    3. Confirm each selected filter is highlighted/active
    4. Observe result list updates
  failure_modes:
    - 'Applying filter within a narrow scope when a global scope was intended'
    - 'Forgetting to combine multiple filters when required'
    - 'Misinterpreting empty results as task failure when filter was correctly applied'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'All requested filters show active/selected state'
    - 'Scope indicator matches intended location'
    - 'Result count consistent with filter combination'

CATEGORY: SORT_ENTRIES
  precondition: Listing view with sort controls available via menu
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open overflow/options menu
    2. Choose sort action
    3. Select desired sort criterion and order
  failure_modes:
    - 'Selecting a similar but incorrect criterion (e.g., wrong direction)'
    - 'Sort controls unavailable in aggregated views'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Reopening sort shows the chosen option marked'
    - 'Order of visible items matches the criterion'

CATEGORY: CHANGE_VIEW_LAYOUT
  precondition: Listing view with a layout toggle
  abstract_steps:
    1. Locate the layout toggle control
    2. Tap to switch between list and grid
    3. Observe item arrangement change
  failure_modes:
    - 'Misreading icon semantics (icon often depicts the OPPOSITE layout)'
    - 'Repeated toggling that returns to the original layout'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Item arrangement matches target layout'
    - 'Toggle icon now depicts the alternate layout'

CATEGORY: TOGGLE_SETTING
  precondition: Container with a binary view/option in its menu
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open overflow menu
    2. Tap the option to flip its state
  failure_modes:
    - 'Option not present in current scope/view'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Reopening menu shows the inverted label or checked state'

CATEGORY: SEARCH_QUERY
  precondition: App provides a search affordance reachable from current scope
  abstract_steps:
    1. Activate search control
    2. Ensure input field is focused
    3. Type the query
    4. Optionally apply type/category filters
    5. Submit or rely on live search
  failure_modes:
    - 'Searching within a narrow scope when target may be elsewhere'
    - 'Typing before focus is set causing lost input'
    - 'Treating empty result set as conclusive without broadening scope'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Query string visible in search bar'
    - 'Active filters match request'
    - 'Scope indicator reflects intended breadth'

CATEGORY: QUERY_INFO
  precondition: Information is discoverable via navigation, filter, or search
  abstract_steps:
    1. Navigate to the most relevant scope
    2. Apply any filters needed to isolate the subset
    3. Scroll fully to enumerate or inspect items
    4. Derive the answer (count, presence, name, recency)
  failure_modes:
    - 'Counting only the visible portion without scrolling'
    - 'Confusing aggregated vs physical directory contents'
    - 'Misreading truncated names in grid view'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'All matching items have been viewed'
    - 'Layout chosen allows reading full names if needed'
    - 'Final answer format matches request (number, yes/no, name)'

CATEGORY: DELETE_ENTRY
  precondition: An identifiable entry exists in current scope and a removal control is available
  abstract_steps:
    1. Locate the target entry in the listing or history
    2. Activate the per-item delete/remove control
    3. Confirm removal if prompted
  failure_modes:
    - 'Misidentifying a similarly named entry'
    - 'Removal control hidden by keyboard or off-screen'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Entry no longer present after refresh'
    - 'No unintended entries were removed'

CATEGORY: RECOVER_FROM_LAUNCHER_ISSUES
  precondition: Unexpected system dialog or wrong app launched
  abstract_steps:
    1. Dismiss popups via Back or Wait/Close
    2. Return to home via Home button
    3. Re-initiate the intended navigation
  failure_modes:
    - 'Repeating the same failing gesture without recovery'
    - 'Accidentally launching unrelated apps from a customization menu'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Home screen or app drawer is reachable'
    - 'Target app launches and reaches expected landing state'

DownloadSendReceiptTask.text:
# App guidance
The following workflow knowledge was learned from this app or related apps of the same category. Use it to plan; it describes WHAT to do at a high level, not exact coordinates — you still must look at the screenshot to ground each action.

## For [Mail]  (category: Communication, source: pretrained)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 2: GENERIC  (transferable, app-agnostic)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
L_C CATEGORY: Communication
CATEGORY: NAVIGATE_TO
  precondition: Starting at home or app's root, or at some default landing screen; user knows the destination screen exists within the app
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the app drawer if app shortcut not on home
    2. Launch target app
    3. Dismiss permission prompts and onboarding tooltips
    4. Identify if target location is a virtual category or a physical path
    5. From the current screen, identify the likely entry point (top-bar icon, menu item, settings row, primary navigation menu)
    6. Select the appropriate top-level destination
    7. Drill down through sub-folders/tabs/menus toward the target screen
    8. If the resulting screen is wrong, back out and try the next candidate, iterating through known entry points (info icon, gear, overflow) systematically
    9. Confirm target screen is visible
  failure_modes:
    - 'Confusing a category filter applied within the current folder with global navigation to that category'
    - 'Opening the wrong adjacent item due to imprecise tap coordinates'
    - 'Swipe gesture interpreted as long-press, opening home customization menu'
    - 'Launching a similarly-named but wrong app (e.g. dialer vs. contacts manager)'
    - 'Tooltip overlays obscuring desired control'
    - 'Confusing icons with similar appearance'
    - 'Getting trapped in modal dialogs (permissions, defaults) that close the app on cancel'
    - 'Mis-tapping on adjacent UI elements'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Header/breadcrumb/page title reflects the intended destination'
    - 'Visible content matches expectations for that location'
    - 'Expected controls are interactive'
    - "Target screen's distinguishing visual cues are present"
    - 'Back navigation returns to a known prior screen'

CATEGORY: QUERY_INFO
  precondition: Target item, list, or information is reachable somewhere in the app
  abstract_steps:
    1. Navigate to the most likely container screen (list / detail / about / settings / tab / help)
    2. Optionally apply filters or search to narrow the view
    3. Use search or scroll to locate the data
    4. Read the requested attribute/value/count/status from the list card, item-detail/info screen, or rendered UI
    5. Return the value in the requested format
  failure_modes:
    - 'Reading from a filtered subset that excludes the target'
    - 'Confusing modification time with creation time'
    - 'Counting items while extra filters are still active'
    - 'Misreading empty-state as a value other than zero'
    - 'Filter not applied, leading to wrong count'
    - 'Information located in a different app than expected'
    - 'Reading truncated preview text instead of the full content'
    - 'Assuming a value from the list when the detail differs'
    - 'Searching with overly strict formatting (e.g., punctuation) and getting no results'
    - 'Looking in the wrong menu (overflow vs info icon vs gear)'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Value taken from the authoritative detail view when precision is needed'
    - 'All required filters are active and only those'
    - 'Result reported in the requested units/format'
    - 'Source screen clearly shows the answered value'
    - 'Empty-state messages map to 0/None'
    - 'Value matches the literal text shown on screen'
    - 'If multiple matches exist, the correct contextual one was chosen'

CATEGORY: SEARCH_ENTRY
  precondition: App provides a search affordance and/or filter chips on a listing view
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open the search interface or tap filter chip
    2. Type the query string or provide selection
    3. Optionally apply category/type filters
    4. Submit if needed (keyboard enter)
    5. Inspect results or empty state
  failure_modes:
    - 'Searching within a narrower scope than intended'
    - 'Typing into a non-focused field (accidentally editing content)'
    - 'Chip is off-screen; needs horizontal swipe'
    - 'Search not executed because submit not pressed'
    - 'No results misinterpreted'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Query text shown in the search bar'
    - 'Applied filters are highlighted/active'
    - 'Result list (or explicit no-match state) is visible'

CATEGORY: DELETE_HISTORY_ENTRY
  precondition: Search interface exposes recent queries
  abstract_steps:
    1. Open search, ensure input is empty so history is shown
    2. Locate the target history row
    3. Tap the per-row dismiss control
  failure_modes:
    - 'Target entry not present (already cleared or never recorded)'
    - 'Confusing executing a new search with viewing history'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Target row no longer appears in the history list'

CATEGORY: CHANGE_VIEW_OR_SORT
  precondition: List/grid view is currently shown
  abstract_steps:
    1. Locate the layout toggle or overflow menu
    2. Toggle layout or pick the desired sort criterion
    3. Confirm the visible change
  failure_modes:
    - 'Misreading the toggle icon (it represents the alternate mode, not the current one)'
    - 'Selection mode blocking interaction with view controls'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Items visibly re-arranged in target layout/order'
    - 'Toggle icon now shows the opposite state'

CATEGORY: ADD_ENTRY
  precondition: User is in a list-style or writable container screen of the relevant data domain with an add affordance available, and permission/default-app prerequisites satisfied
  abstract_steps:
    1. Trigger the add-new-entry control (primary create affordance, floating action button, '+' icon, or overflow create menu)
    2. Choose the create-new option if a menu appears
    3. Focus each required input field explicitly before typing
    4. Type each piece of data into the corresponding field
    5. If a field's label/category is configurable, open its selector and choose the requested option
    6. Optionally attach media (capture or pick) via the dedicated picker dialog
    7. Dismiss the on-screen keyboard if it hides remaining fields (system back) or scroll the form
    8. If a follow-up form appears, fill remaining required fields
    9. Submit/save using the primary action (often top-right) or confirm with checkmark/OK
  failure_modes:
    - 'Attempting to create in a virtual/filtered view that disallows creation'
    - 'Submitting without entering a name'
    - 'Tapping near the avatar/header accidentally opens the photo picker'
    - 'Typing without focusing a field causes data loss or duplication'
    - 'Premature save with empty required fields triggers validation error'
    - 'Auto-suggested text or pre-existing text concatenates with typed text'
    - 'Tapping a similar icon that opens a different mode (e.g., add-participant vs add-contact)'
    - 'Forgetting to press the final Save/checkmark, leaving changes unpersisted'
    - 'Dismissing required permission/default-handler prompts and being kicked out of the app'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'New entry appears in the destination list or relevant screen'
    - 'Breadcrumb/location is the intended container'
    - 'Post-save detail view shows all entered values'
    - 'Confirmation toast/snackbar appears with entity name'
    - 'Configurable labels reflect chosen option'
    - 'Attached media renders as expected'
    - 'Returning to the list and re-opening shows the entry persisted'

CATEGORY: EDIT_ENTRY
  precondition: Target item can be selected and an action menu is reachable, or entry detail view is open
  abstract_steps:
    1. Long-press or otherwise select the item, or open the entity detail view
    2. Activate edit mode (e.g., pencil icon) or open the action menu and choose the edit/rename action
    3. Focus the field needing change
    4. Clear existing content via long-press select or backspace
    5. Type corrected value while preserving constraints (e.g., extensions)
    6. Scroll to reveal fields hidden by the keyboard
    7. Confirm/save the change
  failure_modes:
    - 'Single-tap inadvertently opens the item instead of selecting it'
    - 'Overwriting protected portions like the file extension'
    - 'Replacing text without selecting first causes append instead of overwrite'
    - 'Dismissing without saving loses edits'
    - 'Editing a similarly-named entity by mistake'
    - 'Keyboard obscuring fields, leading to no input'
    - 'Field unfocused at moment of typing, so input is lost'
  verification_checklist:
    - 'Updated value appears in the list'
    - 'Constraints preserved (extension, type)'
    - 'Detail view reflects updated values'
    - 'No leftover duplicate characters'
    - 'Confirmation toast appears'
    - 'Re-entering edit mode shows persisted values'

CATEGORY: MOVE_OR_COPY_ENTRY
  precondition: Item is selectable; destination is accessible
  abstract_steps:
